hypothesis: Augmenting a domain-specific agentic information extractor with a retrieval-augmented reasoning module that consults a structured chemistry knowledge base (including SMILES mappings, ontology relations, and literature-validated property associations) during document preprocessing and reasoning will improve cross-domain generalization and increase the F1 score by at least 0.12 on high-complexity ChemX nanomaterial and small-molecule datasets compared to the best existing single-agent baseline.
